galleries.name: Reading & Literature
galleries.description: writing, grammar, languages, storytelling, journalism, media, rhetoric, and literature.
quotes: Every book is a doorway, and imagination is the key.
A story can take you farther than any road.
The more you read, the larger your world becomes.

galleries.name: Read Alouds
galleries.description: Stories and audiobooks to enjoy together or independently.
quotes: A story shared aloud becomes a memory shared together.
Listening closely is another way of learning to see.
Words come alive when a voice gives them wings.

galleries.name: Mathematics & Logic
galleries.description: Numbers, puzzles, problem-solving, and mathematical thinking. Arithmetic, algebra, geometry, statistics, probability, formal logic, and problem-solving.
quotes: Every puzzle becomes clearer one step at a time.
Patterns are the quiet language of the universe.
A difficult problem is an invitation to think differently.

galleries.name: Physical Sciences
galleries.description: Experiments, simulations, Physics, chemistry, astronomy, geology, meteorology, and the study of matter and energy.
quotes: Curiosity begins with a question and grows through discovery.
Look closely; the smallest detail may hold the biggest wonder.
Every experiment teaches us something, even when it surprises us.

galleries.name: History & Archaeology
galleries.description: People, places, documents, and stories from the past. Ancient civilizations, world history, local history, historical people, archaeology, and major events.
quotes: The past leaves clues for those willing to look.
Understanding yesterday helps us choose tomorrow wisely.
Every ordinary life is part of a larger story.

galleries.name: Geography
galleries.description: Maps, countries, cultures, and the world around us.
quotes: The world grows smaller when we learn how others live.
Every map is an invitation to explore.
A new place can teach us a new way to see.

galleries.name: Space
galleries.description: Planets, stars, missions, and the wider universe.
quotes: Wonder begins wherever the known world ends.
The night sky reminds us how much remains to discover.
Big questions often begin by looking up.

galleries.name: Nature & Animals
galleries.description: Birds, plants, ecosystems, and outdoor discovery.
quotes: Nature rewards the person who slows down enough to notice.
Small changes, given time, can shape an entire landscape.
There is always something new beneath an old tree.

galleries.name: Engineering
galleries.description: Design, build, invent, test, and improve. machines, inventions, architecture, design, and applied engineering.
quotes: Ideas become useful when we give them shape.
Build, test, adjust, and try again.
Every invention begins with someone imagining a better way.

galleries.name: Coding & Technology
galleries.description: Programming, computer skills, and digital creativity.
quotes: A large creation is often built one small instruction at a time.
Mistakes are clues that help us improve the design.
Code turns careful thinking into something others can use.

galleries.name: Cultures & Languages
galleries.description: Learn new languages and explore communication. religion, ethics, philosophy, customs
quotes: Every language offers another window into the human world.
New words make room for new ideas.
Understanding grows when we learn how others express themselves.

galleries.name: Art
galleries.description: Drawing, museums, techniques, and creative expression. Visual art, theater, film, dance, and human expression
quotes: Art begins when you notice something worth expressing.
There is no single right way to make something meaningful.
Your imagination deserves a place in the world.

galleries.name: Music
galleries.description: Music theory, sound, rhythm, and composition.
quotes: Music can say what ordinary words cannot.
A single note matters because of what surrounds it.
Listening is where music truly begins.

galleries.name: Typing
galleries.description: Build speed, accuracy, and keyboard confidence.
quotes: Confidence grows through patient practice.
Accuracy first; speed follows.
Every skill becomes easier through steady repetition.

galleries.name: Economics & Finance
galleries.description: Markets, money, budgeting, trade, entrepreneurship, accounting, investing, management, and personal finance.
quotes: Small choices repeated over time can create lasting change.
Wise planning gives future possibilities room to grow.
Money is a tool; understanding helps us use it well.

galleries.name: Life Skills
galleries.description: Everyday knowledge, career skills, and practical learning.
quotes: Independence is built through many small acts of practice.
Useful knowledge becomes confidence in action.
Learning how to care for daily life is a form of wisdom.

galleries.name: Life Sciences & Health
galleries.description: Biology, ecology, medicine, anatomy, nutrition, psychology, exercise, and public health.
quotes: Serious study begins with the courage to remain curious.
Knowledge deepens when we connect ideas across subjects.
The goal of learning is not only to know more, but to understand better.

galleries.name: Society, Government, and Law
galleries.description: Sociology, politics, civics, legal systems, public policy, international relations, and social issues.
quotes: A good explanation can turn confusion into possibility.
Watch actively, pause thoughtfully, and follow your questions.
Seeing an idea in motion can help it settle in the mind.

galleries.name: Faith & Values
galleries.description: Religion, spirituality, sacred texts, moral beliefs, character, ethics, traditions, and worship.
quotes: A thoughtful life is built from what we choose to value.
Character grows through the choices no one else sees.
The heart learns through reflection, practice, and care.

galleries.name: Broad Range of Knowledge
galleries.description: Resources that cover many topics

resources.name: NASA STEM
resources.description: Space science activities, missions, and learning resources.

resources.name: Smithsonian Learning Lab
resources.description: Explore millions of Smithsonian resources and learning collections.

resources.name: PhET Interactive Simulations
resources.description: Interactive math and science simulations from the University of Colorado Boulder.

resources.name: Storyline Online
resources.description: Children's books read aloud by celebrated actors.

resources.name: Unite for Literacy
resources.description: A colorful digital library with narration in many languages.

resources.name: LibriVox
resources.description: Free public-domain audiobooks read by volunteers.

resources.name: San Diego Zoo Kids
resources.description: Animal facts, videos, stories, and activities.

resources.name: Monterey Bay Aquarium Live Cams
resources.description: Watch sea otters, jellyfish, sharks, and other ocean life live.

resources.name: Explore.org Live Nature Cams
resources.description: Live wildlife and nature cameras from around the world.

resources.name: NASA Eyes
resources.description: Interactive 3D visualizations of planets, spacecraft, and Earth.

resources.name: ESA Kids
resources.description: Space news, games, and learning from the European Space Agency.

resources.name: Cornell Lab of Ornithology
resources.description: Bird science, live cams, identification, and learning resources.

resources.name: Tinkercad
resources.description: Create 3D designs, circuits, and beginner-friendly engineering projects.

resources.name: Math Learning Center Bridges
resources.description: Free math apps and manipulatives for visual problem-solving.

resources.name: Simple Joy Art
resources.description: Art lessons and creative projects.

resources.name: Libraries of Hope Rotation
resources.description: A rotating collection of literature and learning resources.

resources.name: Heart Studies Rotation
resources.description: Come join us at "Grandma's House" as Marlene reads some of the stories from the golden age of storytelling. Stories are arranged according to the WEH Rotation schedule

resources.name: Khan Academy- Courses for everything
resources.description: Our mission is to provide a free, world-class education to anyone, anywhere.

resources.name: Beast Academy Playground
resources.description:
Playground helps kids build numerical literacy and problem-solving confidence.

Explore our growing collection of free tabletop math activities.

resources.name: Enrich Maths
resources.description: Our collection of activities are designed to challenge you to work and think like a mathematician.

resources.name: CTC Math
resources.description: Online Math Curriculum

resources.name: Math is Fun
resources.description: Math is Fun online games and simulations

resources.name: Project Gutenberg books
resources.description: Choose among free eBooks to download or read online. You will find the world's great literature here, with focus on older works for which U.S. copyright has expired. Thousands of volunteers digitized and proofread the eBooks, for you to enjoy.

resources.name: Library of Congress
resources.description: The Library of Congress offers classroom materials and professional development to help people effectively use primary sources from the Library's vast digital collections in their teaching.

resources.name: Docs Teach
resources.description: A National Archives Foundation educational resource using primary sources from the National Archives

resources.name: BBC interactive history
resources.description: Bring history to life with animated maps, movies, games, picture galleries, virtual 3D tours and programme clips.

resources.name: BBC History for kids
resources.description: Enter ancient worlds, meet famous people and discover fascinating facts by exploring a wide selection of historical games and activities.

resources.name: Chess.com
resources.description: Play and learn chess online

resources.name: Chrome Music Lab
resources.description: Chrome Music Lab is a website that makes learning music more accessible through fun, hands-on experiments.

resources.name: Google Arts and Cluture
resources.description: Google Arts & Culture works with cultural institutions and artists around the world. Together, our mission is to preserve and bring the world’s art and culture online so it’s accessible to anyone, anywhere.

resources.name: Google Earth Tours
resources.description: Take a guided tour around the globe with some of the world’s leading storytellers, scientists and nonprofits. Explore stories and maps about sustainability, environment and cultural preservation.

resources.name: Topics and Questions Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints
resources.description: This is an alphabetized list of topics and answers. “Asking questions isn’t a sign of weakness; it’s a precursor of growth.” The articles in this resource offer several suggestions that can help you find peace as you seek answers to your questions.

resources.name: Gospel Library
resources.description: Find, study, apply, and share Church teachings from the full digital Gospel Library. Discover gospel principles and explore teachings to enrich your life and the lives of those you love.

resources.name: Futurescape
resources.description: Explore Future Careers Based On Your Personality And Passions

resources.name: History Matters
resources.description: History Matters is a history-focused channel with short introductions to multiple topics;  for people who are simply interested in World History. Videos will also focus on the lesser-known parts of history too and dive deep into questions that many people ask but aren't often answered.

resources.name: icivics games
resources.description: Civic learning empowers young people to own the past, take the helm, and chart a course toward the future. We welcome students to form their own opinions, contributing important and unique voices to the public conversation about civic education in the United States.

resources.name: Language Transfer
resources.description:
Language Transfer Introduction and Complete audio courses capture real life learning experiences in which you can participate fully, wherever you are in the world!  

Just engage, pause, think and answer out loud, the rest will take care of itself!

resources.name: Life Help Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints
resources.description: Life presents challenges, trials, and obstacles on our journey here on earth. Regardless of your circumstances, the Lord loves you and wants to help you. The Church offers resources to help you navigate these challenges.

resources.name: Metropolitan Museum of Art Kids
resources.description: Made for, with, and by kids

resources.name: Miacademy videos
resources.description: A broad selection of learning videos for K-12. We hope you are enjoying them!

resources.name: Music Theory.net
resources.description: a popular, free educational website offering interactive music theory lessons, exercises, and calculators. It provides animated tutorials that break down everything from the basics of note reading to advanced chords and progressions, alongside highly customizable practice exercises

resources.name: National Geographic kids
resources.description: photography, engaging articles, and interactive features centered around animals, science, history, and nature

resources.name: Nitrotype
resources.description: Nitro Type's engaging, competitive format rapidly builds speed and accuracy through repeated practice.

resources.name: Numberphile
resources.description: Videos about numbers and mathematics.

resources.name: Music Library Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints
resources.description: The largest collection of music provided by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints for worship including hymns, songs, music for youth, choir, instrumentalists, and more.

resources.name: Scishow kids
resources.description: Join host Jessi, her robot rat friend Squeaks, and all their friends at the Fort as they explain fun, complex science concepts for young, curious minds. Whether conducting experiments, researching new questions, or talking with experts, there’s always something new to discover with SciShow Kids, no matter what your age!

resources.name: Scishow Psych
resources.description: Your brain is endlessly fascinating. SciShow Psych is all about exploring the human mind using the hardcore research you know and love from SciShow. Join us every week to learn about our super complicated brains!

resources.name: Scratch Coding
resources.description: Scratch is the world’s largest creative learning community for kids, where young people bring their stories, games, and animations to life and share them with peers around the world in a safe, moderated online community

resources.name: Seterra Geography games
resources.description: Become a geography expert and have fun at the same time! Seterra is an entertaining and educational geography game that gives you access to over 400 customizable quizzes. Seterra will challenge you with quizzes about countries, capitals, flags, oceans, lakes and more! Introduced in 1997 and available in more than 40 different languages, Seterra has helped millions of people study geography and learn about their world.

resources.name: Smarter Every Day
resources.description: I explore the world using science.  That's pretty much all there is to it.  Watch 2 videos. If you learn something AWESOME

resources.name: Typing.com
resources.description: online typing tutor, and digital literacy platform

resources.name: Veritasium
resources.description: Videos about science, education, and anything else we find interesting.

siteSettings.title: Wonder Hall
siteSettings.tagline: Step inside. Your next adventure is waiting.
siteSettings.featuredDescription: Explore NASA resources, watch planets in motion, visit the ISS, and discover the wonders beyond Earth.
